stemHtml: Which of the following statements accurately depicts the relationship between weight and maximum range for a turbojet airplane? At higher weights, the operating altitude...

options.a: Decreases, Specific fuel consumption (SFC) increases, and SR decreases.
options.b: Decreases, Specific fuel consumption (SFC) decreases, and SR increases.
options.c: Increases, Specific fuel consumption (SFC) increases, and SR decreases.
options.d: Increases, Specific fuel consumption (SFC) decreases, and SR increases.
